description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design. The headband and outer ear cups are finished in matte black, while the ear cushions and inner headband feature a soft, tan leather or leather-like material. The ear cups are circular and padded, providing comfort for extended use, and are attached to the headband with a seamless, integrated hinge. The headphones appear wireless, as there are no visible wires or connectors, and the overall construction suggests a lightweight yet durable build. The design is minimalist, with no visible branding or external controls, making it suitable for both casual and professional urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with matte black exteriors and tan cushioned ear pads, featuring a minimalist and wireless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both circular ear cups and the padded headband, highlighting the tan cushions and black frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the ear cup and the seamless connection to the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both ear cups and the headband visible, emphasizing the symmetry and padding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the ear cup and headband connection.
